content.text:
The Montreal Expos became the Washington Nationals before the **2005 season**. 

The franchise relocated from Montreal to Washington, D.C., and the team officially became the Nationals when they began play in Washington in April 2005. Their first game as the Washington Nationals was on April 4, 2005.

The Expos had played in Montreal from 1969 until the end of the 2004 season before the move was finalized.
